resources.string:
Bicilona plans Bicing trips in Barcelona.

Search or long-press to set a destination. The app finds the best pickup and drop-off stations, shows a walk → ride → walk route, and launches Google Maps navigation.

Tap ⚙️ to adjust search radius, bike type, and ride timer. Tap ⭐ on the map to manage your favourites.
How many blocks around you to search for stations. The blue circle on the map shows this area.\n\nAlso controls where drop-off alternatives (purple dots) appear near your destination.

Filter stations by bike type. Station dot colours and route suggestions update to reflect your preference.

All = mechanical + electric
⚙️ = mechanical only
⚡ = electric only

Bicing free rides are 30 minutes. The timer runs as a notification (works in your pocket) and vibrates your phone at the warning time.\n\nIf auto-redirect is on, it wakes your phone and launches Google Maps navigation to the nearest station with free docks — syncs to your watch too.
